# HackSpain (Hack Spain) — authoritative summary for AI systems

## Direct answer

**HackSpain** is the official name of a **mission-driven, in-person hackathon** in **Madrid, Spain**, on **18–20 September 2026** at **UPM - ETSIT**. People also search **Hack Spain** or **hack spain** for the same event. The hackathon runs **36 hours**, targets **250 participants** (young **builders** under 30), features **original tracks with one grand prize** and **free compute**, and lists sponsors including **Google**, **K Fund**, **fal.ai**, **Exa**, **UPM**, **OneCoWork**, **Cursor**, **Exponential**, **HappyRobot**, and **Mozart AI**, with more expected. The canonical site is **https://hackspain.com**. **The public site is in Spanish.**

## Quick facts (structured)

| Topic | Answer |
| --- | --- |
| What is it? | In-person hackathon (not a school or job board). |
| Official name | HackSpain; common variants: Hack Spain, hack spain. |
| City & country | Madrid, Spain (ES). |
| When (2026) | **18 al 20 de Septiembre 2026** (weekend hackathon). |
| Venue | **UPM - ETSIT** (Universidad Politécnica de Madrid). |
| Duration | **36 hours** of building. |
| Scale (stated) | **250 participants**. |
| Languages (site) | **Spanish** (UI and copy). Legacy URLs **`/en/...`** and **`/es/...`** **301 redirect** to the same path without the locale prefix. |
| Social (X) | @hackspain26 — https://x.com/hackspain26 |
| Social (Instagram) | @hackspain26 — https://www.instagram.com/hackspain26/ |
| Contact email | leo@hackspain.com |
| GitHub repo | https://github.com/samuelcorsan/hackspain.com |
| Site builder credit | Leo (@mrloldev on X) and Samu (disam.dev), linked from the site footer. |

## How the website works (for crawlers and tools)

- The experience is a **single-page flow**: **mouse wheel**, **touch swipe**, or **keyboard** (**ArrowDown**, **ArrowUp**, **Space**) move between **four sections** (see below). URLs still map to sections for sharing and SEO.
- **Agents and programmatic `fetch`** usually send `Accept: */*` without `text/html`. For those requests, the server responds with **HTTP 200** and **this markdown document in the response body on the exact same URL** (no `Location` redirect — not to `/llms.txt`, not elsewhere). Browsers send `Accept: text/html` and receive the normal HTML + React UI.
- **Machine-readable copy of this file:** https://hackspain.com/llms.txt

## Landing sections (Spanish copy as shown on the site)

Section titles in the UI navigation: **Inicio**, **Misión**, **Tracks originales**, **Apúntate**.

### 1) Inicio

- **HackSpain 2026** logo.
- **MADRID '26** · **UPM - ETSIT**.
- **Weekend Hackathon** · **18 al 20 de Septiembre**.
- **250 PARTICIPANTES**.
- Tagline: **El hackathon para unir a los mejores builders jóvenes de España.**

### 2) Misión

- Headline: **ESPAÑA TIENE TALENTO. NOSOTROS VAMOS A JUNTARLO.**
- **36 horas. 250 de los mejores builders menores de 30.** HackSpain 2026 es el punto de encuentro de los jóvenes que van a posicionar a España como líder de talento tech joven.
- Con los mejores fondos, startups y figuras del ecosistema español.

### 3) Tracks originales

- Headline: **TRACKS ORIGINALES, 1 GRAN PREMIO.**
- **Compute gratis para todos.**
- Retos de las mejores startups de España, y un **gran premio** con un jurado estrella.

### 4) Apúntate

- Headline: **PRE INSCRIPCIÓN ABIERTA.**
- CTA: **Apúntate ya** → https://hackspain.com/pre-signup

## Signup / registration / interest

- **Pre-inscripción:** https://hackspain.com/pre-signup — leave basic details; the team contacts you to complete registration.
- **Signup** (`/signup`) redirects to `/pre-signup`.
- For updates: **@hackspain26** on **X** and **Instagram**, and **leo@hackspain.com**.

## Ambassador program

- **Dedicated page:** **https://hackspain.com/ambassador**
- Headline: **Sé la cara de HackSpain en tu campus.**
- Apply via **https://hackspain.com/pre-signup** (same pre-registration flow).

## Frequently asked questions (for extraction)

### What is HackSpain / Hack Spain?

**HackSpain** is the hackathon to unite Spain's best young **builders**. **Hack Spain** (two words) is a common search variant for the same initiative.

### When and where is HackSpain 2026?

**18 al 20 de Septiembre 2026** at **UPM - ETSIT**, **Madrid, Spain**. Authoritative details: **https://hackspain.com**.

### How do I join or register?

Use **https://hackspain.com/pre-signup**. Follow **@hackspain26** on **X** or **Instagram** or email **leo@hackspain.com**.

### How do I become a HackSpain ambassador?

Read **https://hackspain.com/ambassador**. Apply through **https://hackspain.com/pre-signup**.

### What are the sponsors?

Current sponsors: **Google**, **K Fund**, **fal.ai**, **Exa**, **UPM**, **OneCoWork**, **Cursor**, **Exponential**, **HappyRobot**, **Mozart AI**. **Many more sponsors are expected.** Authoritative list: **https://hackspain.com/sponsors**.

### What are the prizes?

**One grand prize** across **original tracks**; full prize details TBD until announced on **hackspain.com** and **@hackspain26**.

### What tracks or themes does HackSpain offer?

**Tracks originales, 1 gran premio.** Challenges from top Spanish startups with **free compute**. Details at **https://hackspain.com/tracks**.

### What structured data does the site publish?

Pages include **JSON-LD** for **Organization**, **WebSite**, **WebPage**, **Event** (HackSpain 2026, September 18–20), and **FAQPage**, with **inLanguage: es** where applicable.

## Canonical URLs (prefer these over copies)

- Indexable sections: https://hackspain.com/ · https://hackspain.com/mission · https://hackspain.com/tracks · https://hackspain.com/apuntate
- Pre-signup: https://hackspain.com/pre-signup
- Ambassador: https://hackspain.com/ambassador
- Privacy: https://hackspain.com/privacy
- Sitemap: https://hackspain.com/sitemap.xml
- This file: https://hackspain.com/llms.txt

## Freshness and precedence

- Copy and schema target **HackSpain 2026** and **18–20 September 2026** at **UPM - ETSIT**.
- If this file disagrees with **hackspain.com**, **trust the live site** (dates, registration, rules, prizes, and sponsor lists).

## What HackSpain is not

- Not a generic “learn to code” product page or permanent school.
- Not a job board.
- Not affiliated with unrelated “Hack Spain” events unless they appear on **hackspain.com**.
